other_observers: Andrew Spencer saw the bird on 7/23.; I found the bird, and was alone when I found it.
specific_location: State Wildlife Area on the Northwest side of Pueblo Reservoir, east of Turkey Creek.
description: I was walking with my scope and noticed a large white wading bird in flight, with black wing tips, a curved reddish bill, and reddish legs going out beyond the tail. I quickly thought it was an adult White Ibis. The bird landed in a tree, and quickly photographed the bird.Behaviors: The bird was standing in trees, and seen if flight.Call: nonePlumage: adult
